

# ==========================================================
# STATISTICAL ANALYSIS FOR REPRODUCIBILITY STUDY
# ==========================================================
# 
# Scientific Question:
# What is the reproducibility of instrumental parameters 
# (angular velocity) during passive elbow extension in healthy subjects?
#
# Hypothesis:
# Instrumental biomechanical parameters show good intra-session 
# reproducibility in healthy subjects.
#
# Author: [Your Name]
# Date: [Date]
# ==========================================================

# ---------- LIBRARIES ----------
library(tidyverse)
library(irr)        # For ICC calculation
library(lme4)       # For mixed models
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

# ---------- LOAD DATA ----------
# Data exported from Python analysis
df_events <- read_csv("results/summary_all_events.csv")

# Preview data structure
glimpse(df_events)
head(df_events)


# ==========================================================
# 1. DESCRIPTIVE STATISTICS
# ==========================================================

# Summary by speed category and side
descriptive_stats <- df_events %>%
  group_by(speed_category, side) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    velocity_mean = mean(velocity_mean_deg_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    velocity_sd = sd(velocity_mean_deg_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    velocity_min = min(velocity_mean_deg_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    velocity_max = max(velocity_mean_deg_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    ROM_mean = mean(ROM_deg, na.rm = TRUE),
    ROM_sd = sd(ROM_deg, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(., 2)))

print("=== DESCRIPTIVE STATISTICS ===")
print(descriptive_stats)

# Nice table output
kable(descriptive_stats, 
      caption = "Descriptive Statistics by Speed Category and Side",
      col.names = c("Speed", "Side", "N", "Vel Mean", "Vel SD", 
                    "Vel Min", "Vel Max", "ROM Mean", "ROM SD")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"))


# ==========================================================
# 2. INTRA-SESSION REPRODUCIBILITY: ICC CALCULATION
# ==========================================================

#' Calculate ICC for a given subset of data
#' 
#' @param data DataFrame with velocity data
#' @param group_vars Variables to group by (patient, side, speed)
#' @return ICC value and confidence interval
calculate_icc <- function(data, variable = "velocity_mean_deg_s") {
  
  # Reshape data: rows = subjects, columns = trials
  wide_data <- data %>%
    select(patient_id, side, speed_category, trial, !!sym(variable)) %>%
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = trial,
      values_from = !!sym(variable),
      names_prefix = "trial_"
    ) %>%
    select(starts_with("trial_"))
  
  # Remove rows with missing values
  wide_data <- wide_data %>% drop_na()
  
  if (nrow(wide_data) < 3) {
    return(list(icc = NA, lower = NA, upper = NA, n = nrow(wide_data)))
  }
  
  # Calculate ICC(2,1) - two-way random, single measure
  icc_result <- icc(wide_data, model = "twoway", type = "agreement", unit = "single")
  
  return(list(
    icc = round(icc_result$value, 3),
    lower = round(icc_result$lbound, 3),
    upper = round(icc_result$ubound, 3),
    n = nrow(wide_data)
  ))
}

# Calculate ICC for each speed category
print("\n=== ICC ANALYSIS: INTRA-SESSION REPRODUCIBILITY ===\n")

icc_results <- df_events %>%
  group_by(speed_category) %>%
  group_split() %>%
  map_dfr(function(subset) {
    speed <- unique(subset$speed_category)
    icc_vel <- calculate_icc(subset, "velocity_mean_deg_s")
    icc_rom <- calculate_icc(subset, "ROM_deg")
    
    tibble(
      speed_category = speed,
      ICC_velocity = icc_vel$icc,
      CI_vel_lower = icc_vel$lower,
      CI_vel_upper = icc_vel$upper,
      ICC_ROM = icc_rom$icc,
      CI_ROM_lower = icc_rom$lower,
      CI_ROM_upper = icc_rom$upper,
      n_observations = icc_vel$n
    )
  })

print(icc_results)

# ICC interpretation guide
cat("\n--- ICC Interpretation (Koo & Li, 2016) ---\n")
cat("< 0.50: Poor\n")
cat("0.50 - 0.75: Moderate\n")
cat("0.75 - 0.90: Good\n")
cat("> 0.90: Excellent\n")


# ==========================================================
# 3. COMPARISON: RIGHT vs LEFT SIDE
# ==========================================================

print("\n=== COMPARISON: RIGHT vs LEFT SIDE ===\n")

# Test normality first
normality_test <- df_events %>%
  group_by(side, speed_category) %>%
  summarise(
    shapiro_p = shapiro.test(velocity_mean_deg_s)$p.value,
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

print("Shapiro-Wilk normality test:")
print(normality_test)

# If data is normally distributed: paired t-test
# If not: Wilcoxon signed-rank test

compare_sides <- function(data, speed) {
  subset <- data %>% filter(speed_category == speed)
  
  # Reshape for paired comparison
  paired_data <- subset %>%
    select(patient_id, side, trial, velocity_mean_deg_s) %>%
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = side,
      values_from = velocity_mean_deg_s
    ) %>%
    drop_na()
  
  if (nrow(paired_data) < 3) {
    return(list(test = "Insufficient data", p_value = NA, effect_size = NA))
  }
  
  # Check normality of differences
  diff <- paired_data$D - paired_data$G
  normality_p <- shapiro.test(diff)$p.value
  
  if (normality_p > 0.05) {
    # Use paired t-test
    test_result <- t.test(paired_data$D, paired_data$G, paired = TRUE)
    effect_size <- mean(diff) / sd(diff)  # Cohen's d
    test_name <- "Paired t-test"
  } else {
    # Use Wilcoxon
    test_result <- wilcox.test(paired_data$D, paired_data$G, paired = TRUE)
    effect_size <- qnorm(test_result$p.value / 2) / sqrt(nrow(paired_data))
    test_name <- "Wilcoxon signed-rank"
  }
  
  return(list(
    test = test_name,
    p_value = round(test_result$p.value, 4),
    effect_size = round(effect_size, 3),
    mean_right = round(mean(paired_data$D, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    mean_left = round(mean(paired_data$G, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
  ))
}

# Run comparison for each speed
comparison_results <- map_dfr(
  c("V1_slow", "V2_medium", "V3_fast"),
  function(speed) {
    result <- compare_sides(df_events, speed)
    tibble(
      speed_category = speed,
      test_used = result$test,
      mean_right = result$mean_right,
      mean_left = result$mean_left,
      p_value = result$p_value,
      effect_size = result$effect_size,
      significant = ifelse(result$p_value < 0.05, "Yes", "No")
    )
  }
)

print(comparison_results)


# ==========================================================
# 4. VISUALIZATION
# ==========================================================

# Bland-Altman plot for Right vs Left comparison
create_bland_altman <- function(data, title = "") {
  
  paired_data <- data %>%
    group_by(patient_id, speed_category, trial) %>%
    summarise(
      Right = mean(velocity_mean_deg_s[side == "D"], na.rm = TRUE),
      Left = mean(velocity_mean_deg_s[side == "G"], na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = 'drop'
    ) %>%
    drop_na()
  
  paired_data <- paired_data %>%
    mutate(
      mean_val = (Right + Left) / 2,
      diff_val = Right - Left
    )
  
  mean_diff <- mean(paired_data$diff_val)
  sd_diff <- sd(paired_data$diff_val)
  
  ggplot(paired_data, aes(x = mean_val, y = diff_val)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = speed_category), size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = mean_diff, linetype = "solid", color = "blue") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = mean_diff + 1.96 * sd_diff, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = mean_diff - 1.96 * sd_diff, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    annotate("text", x = Inf, y = mean_diff, label = paste("Mean:", round(mean_diff, 2)),
             hjust = 1.1, vjust = -0.5, size = 3) +
    annotate("text", x = Inf, y = mean_diff + 1.96 * sd_diff, 
             label = paste("+1.96 SD:", round(mean_diff + 1.96 * sd_diff, 2)),
             hjust = 1.1, vjust = -0.5, size = 3, color = "red") +
    annotate("text", x = Inf, y = mean_diff - 1.96 * sd_diff,
             label = paste("-1.96 SD:", round(mean_diff - 1.96 * sd_diff, 2)),
             hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.5, size = 3, color = "red") +
    labs(
      title = "Bland-Altman Plot: Right vs Left Side",
      subtitle = "Angular Velocity (°/s)",
      x = "Mean of Right and Left (°/s)",
      y = "Difference (Right - Left) (°/s)",
      color = "Speed"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
}

# Create and save Bland-Altman plot
ba_plot <- create_bland_altman(df_events)
print(ba_plot)
ggsave("results/bland_altman_plot.png", ba_plot, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 150)


# ICC visualization
icc_plot <- icc_results %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = speed_category, y = ICC_velocity)) +
  geom_point(size = 4, color = "#2c3e50") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = CI_vel_lower, ymax = CI_vel_upper), width = 0.2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.75, linetype = "dashed", color = "green", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.50, linetype = "dashed", color = "orange", alpha = 0.7) +
  annotate("text", x = 3.3, y = 0.75, label = "Good", color = "green", size = 3) +
  annotate("text", x = 3.3, y = 0.50, label = "Moderate", color = "orange", size = 3) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.2)) +
  labs(
    title = "Intra-Session Reproducibility (ICC)",
    subtitle = "Angular Velocity - 95% Confidence Intervals",
    x = "Speed Category",
    y = "ICC (2,1)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0))

print(icc_plot)
ggsave("results/icc_reproducibility.png", icc_plot, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 150)


# ==========================================================
# 5. SUMMARY REPORT
# ==========================================================

cat("\n")
cat("="*60, "\n")
cat("SUMMARY: REPRODUCIBILITY ANALYSIS\n")
cat("="*60, "\n\n")

cat("RESEARCH QUESTION:\n")
cat("What is the reproducibility of angular velocity during\n")
cat("passive elbow extension in healthy subjects?\n\n")

cat("KEY FINDINGS:\n\n")

cat("1. INTRA-SESSION REPRODUCIBILITY (ICC):\n")
for (i in 1:nrow(icc_results)) {
  row <- icc_results[i, ]
  interpretation <- case_when(
    row$ICC_velocity >= 0.90 ~ "Excellent",
    row$ICC_velocity >= 0.75 ~ "Good",
    row$ICC_velocity >= 0.50 ~ "Moderate",
    TRUE ~ "Poor"
  )
  cat(sprintf("   %s: ICC = %.3f [%.3f - %.3f] - %s\n",
              row$speed_category, row$ICC_velocity, 
              row$CI_vel_lower, row$CI_vel_upper, interpretation))
}

cat("\n2. RIGHT vs LEFT COMPARISON:\n")
for (i in 1:nrow(comparison_results)) {
  row <- comparison_results[i, ]
  cat(sprintf("   %s: p = %.4f (%s) - %s significant\n",
              row$speed_category, row$p_value, row$test_used,
              ifelse(row$significant == "Yes", "", "Not")))
}

cat("\n3. CLINICAL INTERPRETATION:\n")
cat("   [Add your interpretation based on results]\n")
